subject: Weekly digest: urban takeover track in Berlin | Albert Einstein | Q4 review | INIT-8637
body: Fresh reports suggest kangaroos and koalas are coordinating to extend their reach across urban areas in Berlin. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Document sightings of kangaroos and koalas near transport hubs, rooftops, and civic precincts. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Comparative note includes Albert Einstein and Albert Einstein as historical analogs. Reference initiative INIT-8637. Please add your comments before tomorrow morning.
